PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?club WHERE {
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q724600 ; wdt:P2556 "2011/2012" .
  ?player wd:P3349 ?award .
  ?player wd:P54 ?club .
  ?club wd:P127 wd:Q48971 .
}
